key_finding: Residual stream (H) partially rescues WRRA smoking gun. H>V>K at ALL 4 layers on correct positions (H:0.937-0.972). WRRA overall (n=24): H=66.7% at L27 (p=0.076, trending). HIGH-CONFIDENCE WRRA (n=13): H=84.6% at L35 (p=0.011, SIGNIFICANT). Error quality filtering is critical. Consistent with Sun et al. >90%. WRRA upgraded from Weak to Moderate.
evidence_impact: Establishes H>V>K information hierarchy at computation positions. WRRA evidence upgraded from Weak/Inconclusive to Moderate with filtering caveat. Converges with Sun et al. (EMNLP 2025) residual stream detection.
next_planned: Scale WRRA to n>=50 high-confidence errors (harder benchmarks or multi-seed generation), OR cross-model residual stream WRRA replication on Phi-3.5-mini
